info.name: Hunt & Gather
info.attribution:
Layout, board, cards, design, coding, and library image by Jonathan Cox (email: Contact@GettingGames.com for inquiries) and released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The cave icon by Alfan Zulkarnain is available at https://thenounproject.com/icon/cave-5282394/ under the Noun Project License.

All other icons are from assets with attribution in the About overlay.
info.description: Gather food and weapons to prepare for winter, where hunting mammoths and staying alive are the goal!
info.helpText:
Game and scoring information can be found by hovering your mouse over the information box in the top right corner of the screen.

Players take seats. Press the Summer Setup button to begin. A random player (indicated by a button next to the seat area) is chosen to start. 

Drag hunters on the board and drag taken tiles into your player area. Each tile has a specific location in your area that is indicated with a highlighted border. Used weapons should be placed into the weapon discard holder in the bottom left corner of the screen. Click the "Click to end turn" button between all turns.

Begin winter by clicking the Winter Setup button, and select which type of path you want to play with. During winter, placed cubes on camps must go within a highlighted circle in the camp location to be scored.

All scores are automatically calculated.

fields.label: Check this box and click the green button to reset the game.
Check this box and click the green button to change the season to winter.

arguments.addendum: ${player_name} took the highest value mammoth during summer, so they are the starting player for winter.

aid1.detail:
Scoring
Jewels, Jugs, Bones, & Clothes
# of that type: 1 2 3 4 5 6+
Total points : 1 3 6 10 15 20

Cubes on Summer Camps : 5vp
Summer Tiles Makeup - Summer/Winter
Cherries (1vp): 30/30
Mushrooms (2vp): 18/18
Potatoes (1vp): 5/5
Jewels : 10/0
Jugs : 10/0
Bones : 0/10
Clothes : 0/10
Weapons : 12/3
Mammoths (3-8vp) : 3/12

Paths : 19/0
Caves : 5/0
How To Use This Implementation
All victory points are automatically scored when tiles are placed in the correct locations.

Changing Season to Winter: Click the 'Winter Setup' button and select which path type you want. Click the green button and setup for winter will happen automtically. Each cube on a winter camp is replaced with a hunter. The player who took the highest value mammoth in summer automatically becomes the start player for winter.

Summer & Winter Tiles: Place in slot highlighted with dots within your player area.

Cubes on Summer Camps at game end: Place cubes directly on Summer Camps, within the dashed border.
